summary: Iteration 5 testing completed successfully. All 4 production-readiness fixes verified working: (1) /api/health endpoint returns status, database, bot_running, mode; (2) Graceful index creation with try/except; (3) Frontend polling at 30s; (4) Defensive bot auto-start with DB ping. Backend 21/21 tests passed, frontend navigation and dashboard fully functional.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly
Toast overlay can temporarily block button clicks - minor UX issue

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warnings in console due to span wrapper elements inside table/select - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production-readiness features all verified. Health endpoint at /api/health (no auth). Bot starts automatically on server startup with DB ping check. Polling is 30s. All navigation pages work: Dashboard, Trade History, Leaderboard, Backtester, Compare, Configuration.

graceful_index_creation.behavior: try/except wrapper - won't crash if indexes exist

defensive_bot_autostart.behavior: DB ping before auto-start, config check
